name: SKELETON_FUNCTION__RANK_BY_PATENT_COUNT__TARGET_PAIR__ALL_TIME
macro_frame_family_zh: 按专利量排序的靶点对排名
description: Independent frame skeleton for ranking target pairs by patent count under a functional constraint.
cypher_template:
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10
examples: Among target pairs related to the GammaDelta_T_Cell_Activation_Target category, which ones have the most patents? Please return the top 10.
Among target pairs related to the Cytokine_Ligand_Target category, which ones have the most patents? Please return the top 10.
Among target pairs related to the Cytokine_Receptor_Target category, which ones have the most patents? Please return the top 10.
